# Built In. Melbourne

Built In. Melbourne is a premium architectural builder operating across Bayside Melbourne and Melbourne's inner south-east.

Primary URL: https://builtinmelbourne.com.au

## Services

- High-spec architectural renovations
- Bespoke architectural new builds
- Client-side project management

## Builder

Josh Coles is a Registered Domestic Builder with 16 years of experience. He is the single point of contact for Built In. Melbourne projects and personally oversees each build from first meeting through to handover.

## Credentials

- Registered Domestic Builder (Unlimited)
- Victorian practitioner: DB-U 45446
- Company registration: CDB-U 58374
- Built In. Melbourne Pty Ltd
- ABN: 54 610 132 486
- ACN: 610 132 486

## Service Area

Bayside Melbourne and Melbourne's inner south-east, including Brighton, Elsternwick, Beaumaris, Caulfield, Hampton, Sandringham, Black Rock, Mentone, Cheltenham, Highett, Bentleigh, McKinnon, Ormond, Murrumbeena, Carnegie, and surrounding suburbs.

## Contact

Email: josh@builtinmelbourne.com.au
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/builtin.melbourne
